## ✅ Test Coverage Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 05:07:44 PT

Found 0 violations. All source additions and modifications have appropriate test coverage.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Files Reviewed

#### Source Changes
- **packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/planned_pr.py** — Modified (refactored)
  - Function import rename: `extract_metadata_prefix` → `extract_plan_header_block`
  - Logic unchanged, no new tests required
  
- **packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/planned_pr_lifecycle.py** — Modified (refactored)
  - Function renamed and documented: `extract_metadata_prefix()` → `extract_plan_header_block()`
  - Existing tests updated with new function name
  
- **src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/ci_update_pr_body.py** — Modified (refactored)
  - Variable rename: `metadata_prefix_raw` → `plan_header_block_raw`
  - Logic unchanged
  
- **src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/set_pr_description.py** — Modified (refactored)
  - Parameter change in `assemble_pr_body` call: `metadata_prefix=existing_body` → `existing_pr_body=existing_body`
  - Logic unchanged, existing test coverage maintained
  
- **src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_pr_description.py** — Modified (refactored)
  - Parameter change in `assemble_pr_body` call: `metadata_prefix` → `existing_pr_body`
  - Logic unchanged, existing test coverage maintained
  
- **src/erk/cli/commands/pr/rewrite_cmd.py** — Modified (refactored)
  - Parameter change in `assemble_pr_body` call: `metadata_prefix` → `existing_pr_body`
  - Logic unchanged, existing test coverage maintained
  
- **src/erk/cli/commands/pr/shared.py** — Modified (refactored)
  - Parameter change: `metadata_prefix` → `existing_pr_body`
  - Calls `extract_plan_header_block()` to extract header block from full PR body
  - Logic unchanged, tested through submit_pipeline integration tests
  
- **src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py** — Modified (logic addition + refactoring)
  - Added field to `SubmitState`: `existing_pr_body: str`
  - Added function: `capture_existing_pr_body()` — captures full PR body before gt submit overwrites it
  - Modified pipelines: `_push_and_create_pipeline()` and `_submit_pipeline()` include new capture step
  - Refactored `finalize_pr()`: Uses pre-captured body instead of fetching during finalization

#### Test Coverage
- **tests/unit/plan_store/test_planned_pr_lifecycle.py** — Updated ✅
  - Tests renamed to match `extract_plan_header_block()` function
  - 3 test cases with full coverage
  
- **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_ci_update_pr_body.py** — Updated ✅
  - Test code updated with refactored variable names
  
- **tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_capture_existing_pr_body.py** — New ✅
  - 3 comprehensive test cases for `capture_existing_pr_body()`:
    1. `test_captures_full_body_from_existing_pr` — Happy path
    2. `test_no_pr_returns_state_unchanged` — Edge case: no PR exists
    3. `test_pr_with_empty_body_returns_state_unchanged` — Edge case: empty body
  - Uses proper fakes (`FakeGitHub`) and fixtures
  - Validates state immutability via dataclasses.replace()
  
- **All submit_pipeline test files** — Updated ✅
  - State constructors in all 10 test files updated to include `existing_pr_body=""` field
  - Files: test_commit_wip, test_core_submit_flow, test_enhance_with_graphite, test_extract_diff,
    test_fetch_plan_context, test_finalize_pr, test_generate_description, test_graphite_first_flow,
    test_prepare_state, test_run_pipeline
  - New assertions added where needed (e.g., test_run_pipeline verifies initial state)

### Patterns Checked
✅ New function `capture_existing_pr_body()` has dedicated tests (3 test cases, all code paths covered)
✅ Refactored function `extract_plan_header_block()` has tests with new name
✅ All state consumers updated to handle new `existing_pr_body` field
✅ No untestable files added
✅ No test deletions with existing source
✅ Refactoring-only changes maintain existing test coverage
✅ No CLI wrapper-only files added

---

All 8 source files have appropriate test coverage. 7 refactoring-only changes maintain existing tests. 1 new function (capture_existing_pr_body) has 3 dedicated test cases. All 10 submit_pipeline tests updated for new SubmitState field. 0 violations detected.

All 8 source files have appropriate test coverage. 7 refactoring-only changes maintain existing tests. 1 new function (capture_existing_pr_body) has 3 dedicated test cases. All 10 submit_pipeline tests updated for new SubmitState field. 0 violations detected.
- **2026-02-25 03:02:38 PT**: Comprehensive review confirms complete test coverage. 8 source files refactored (7 refactoring-only, 1 logic addition). New function `capture_plan_header_block()` has 3 comprehensive tests. All test files properly updated. 0 violations.

<!-- dignified-python-review -->

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 05:57:34 PT

**Result:** No dignified-python violations found. All code changes are compliant with standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL over EAFP - Uses proper `isinstance()` and membership checks
✅ Exception handling - Proper error boundaries
✅ Path operations - No path.resolve() without exists() checks
✅ Import organization - All module-level, absolute imports
✅ No default parameters - New field parameters correctly handled
✅ Frozen dataclasses - SubmitState properly frozen
✅ Type annotations - Modern union syntax (|) correctly applied
✅ Function signatures - Keyword-only parameters properly marked
✅ Re-exports - No __all__ modifications
✅ Modern string methods - Uses removesuffix() (Python 3.9+)

### Code Quality Notes

The PR includes focused refactoring to:
- Rename `extract_metadata_prefix` → `extract_plan_header_block` (more descriptive)
- Pass full `existing_pr_body` instead of extracted prefix (better separation of concerns)
- Capture PR body before gt submit overwrites it (new pipeline step)
- Use `removesuffix()` instead of manual string slicing (modern Python)

All changes maintain compliance with dignified-python standards.

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/planned_pr.py` - ✅ Compliant
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/plan_store/planned_pr_lifecycle.py` - ✅ Compliant
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/ci_update_pr_body.py` - ✅ Compliant
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/set_pr_description.py` - ✅ Compliant
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_pr_description.py` - ✅ Compliant
- `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/rewrite_cmd.py` - ✅ Compliant
- `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/shared.py` - ✅ Compliant
- `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py` - ✅ Compliant
- All test files - ✅ Compliant

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-25 05:57:34 PT**: Re-verified all changes - refactoring maintains full dignified-python compliance. Function rename, better parameter passing, new pipeline capture step, modern string methods all compliant.
- **2026-02-25 05:09:23 PT**: No violations detected - refactoring to rename metadata extraction function and improve parameter passing. All code follows dignified-python standards.

</details>

## ✅ Dignified Code Simplifier Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 05:57:26 PT

All violations resolved. Code follows dignified-python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL exception handling - Compliant
✅ Pathlib usage - Compliant
✅ Import organization - Compliant
✅ O(1) properties - Compliant
✅ Indentation depth - Compliant
✅ Variable declaration proximity - Fixed and verified
✅ Modern string methods - Excellent (.removesuffix usage)
✅ Frozen dataclasses - Compliant
✅ No backwards compatibility hacks - Compliant

### Violations Summary
No violations found. All previous issues have been resolved:
- `ci_update_pr_body.py:290`: ✓ `metadata_block` moved closer to use, `.removesuffix()` applied
- `shared.py:258`: ✓ `stripped` variable eliminated via inline `.removesuffix()`

### Files Reviewed
- `planned_pr.py`: ✅ Compliant (function/variable rename improves clarity)
- `planned_pr_lifecycle.py`: ✅ Compliant (function rename with excellent docstring updates)
- `ci_update_pr_body.py`: ✅ Compliant (variable relocation + modern string methods)
- `set_pr_description.py`: ✅ Compliant (parameter signature improved)
- `update_pr_description.py`: ✅ Compliant (parameter signature improved)
- `rewrite_cmd.py`: ✅ Compliant (parameter signature improved)
- `shared.py`: ✅ Compliant (parameter refactor + inline removesuffix)
- `submit_pipeline.py`: ✅ Compliant (new field and function follow patterns)
- Test files: ✅ Compliant (state construction updated consistently)

### Code Quality Highlights
- Function rename from `extract_metadata_prefix` to `extract_plan_header_block` significantly improves clarity
- Parameter refactoring from `metadata_prefix` to `existing_pr_body` makes intent more explicit
- Modern string method `.removesuffix()` used instead of manual endswith/slice patterns
- New `capture_existing_pr_body()` function is simple, focused, and follows established patterns
- All state management properly uses frozen dataclasses with `dataclasses.replace()`

---

### Activity Log

- **2026-02-25 05:09:11 PT**: Found 2 violations (variable declaration distance in ci_update_pr_body.py:282 and shared.py:258); refactoring renamed extract_metadata_prefix to extract_plan_header_block for clarity

</details>

✅ **New pipeline step**: `capture_existing_pr_body()` correctly inserted before `push_and_create_pr` in both pipeline tuples
✅ **Frozen dataclass updates**: All state updates use `dataclasses.replace()` - no direct mutation
✅ **Test consistency**: All submit pipeline test files updated with new field in `_make_state()` helpers

No violations found.
